name: Won Tons Stuffed with Cream Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese, sugar, and lemon juice until well combined.
2. Place a spoonful of the mixture in each won ton wrapper.
3. Seal the wrappers tightly with water around the edges.
4. Fry the stuffed won tons for a few seconds on each side.
5. Serve immediately to prevent the cream cheese from spilling into the hot oil.
